title: malache glandulosa
intro: Malache glandulosa, also known as wild mandrake or mandrake root, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Papaveraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds like alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Malache glandulosa include reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Malache glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
